name: sentinel
description: Browser-native AI security layer — detects and redacts sensitive data and prompt-injection attacks before they reach any LLM.

scripts.build: npm run build:engine && npm run build:dashboard
scripts.package:ext: npm run build && cd extension && zip -r -q -X ../sentinel-extension.zip . -x '*.DS_Store' && cd .. && echo 'packaged sentinel-extension.zip'

author: alirizzzv
